title: The Overlooked Path Into Enterprise Marketing: AI Email Dev Intro
description:
This channel is about AI-powered email development, enterprise marketing workflows, proof-of-work projects, and career growth for overlooked builders.

I’m Nat O’Farril, and I’m building in public while still working in corporate. The goal is simple: learn AI, build proof, and grow your value.

In this first intro, I explain why email development is one of the most overlooked paths into enterprise marketing and how I’m building a Brief-to-ZIP AI email workflow.

Subscribe if you want to become the AI-powered email developer companies cannot ignore.
pinnedComment: This is the lane I’m building in public: AI-powered email development, enterprise marketing workflows, and proof-of-work projects. Are you trying to break into enterprise marketing, already working in email, or learning AI from scratch?
